# Anduril Industries and FlackTek Partner to Revolutionize Production of Rocket Motor Systems

Anduril Industries today announced a partnership with FlackTek, a global leader in high-velocity mixing and processing solutions, to develop and manufacture the world's most advanced mixing machine — the Mega FlackTek, also known as "The GOAT" — in Denver, CO.
